title: Get a GST/HST access code - Canada.ca
content:
File your GST/HST return

## Get a GST/HST access code – File your GST/HST return
You may be looking for:
- NETFILE access code for personal income tax

## Get your access code in your CRA account
As of October 20, 2025 , business owners can view their GST/HST access code through their secure CRA account (My Business Account only).
Find out how to get an access code .
The GST/HST access code is a 4-digit code required for some GST/HST filing methods. It is a personal security key that authenticates you when you are not signed into a CRA account. You should not give your access code to anyone unauthorized.
Your GST/HST access code stays the same for every filing period unless you change it.

## Filing without an access code
You do not need an access code if you are filing:
- In your CRA account (My Business Account or Represent a Client)
- Through a participating Canadian financial institution

## When you need an access code
You do need an access code only if you are filing:
- Online using the GST/HST NETFILE form (outside of a CRA account)
- Using third-party accounting software (GST/HST Internet File Transfer)
- Over the phone using GST/HST TELEFILE

## How to get or change an access code
If you are a non-resident, we send you an access code by mail when you register for the GST/HST. You will also get an access code if you receive your GST/HST filing package by mail. This access code is located near the top of the letter in a box.
You can get a new access code online or by phone.
If you lost or forgot your GST/HST access code or if you never received it, there are 3 ways to get or change it:
Sign in to your CRA account to get your access code in your business account. New (2025-10-20)
Representatives who are accessing your account though their representative account will not see your access code , regardless of their authorization level.
- Sign in to your CRA account
- Select your Business account
- Select GST/HST and your RT number
- On the GST/HST account overview page, select the View return details button
- Visit GST/HST access code online
- Enter your business number
- Enter information from a return you filed for a reporting period ending within the last 3 years, either: The reporting period and line 109 (net tax), if the amount on line 109 is not $0.00 The reporting period and confirmation number, if you filed the return electronically
- The reporting period and line 109 (net tax), if the amount on line 109 is not $0.00
- The reporting period and confirmation number, if you filed the return electronically
- Enter the new access code you want
- Use your new access code to file all future GST/HST returns
If you cannot sign in to your CRA account or use the online form, call us:
- In Canada or the United States: 1-800-959-5525
- In Yukon, Northwest Territories or Nunavut only: 1-866-841-1876
- Outside Canada or the United States, call us collect: 613-940-8497

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
